name: Weld, Bill
subject: fwd: this is what happens when actions don’t have consequences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
Did you see this last week? We need your help if we’re going to teach Donald Trump that the American people will not tolerate this kind of behavior from their president. [**Can you help us by making a grassroots contribution to our campaign today?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDlQU01ZWylsxnupNQQwKW0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190922_fr&n=1) Thank you for all of your support,
Bill | | [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDlQU01ZWylsxnupNQQwKW0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190922_fr&n=2)
---
\---- Forwarded message ----
**From** : Team Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : September 20, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDlQU01ZWylsxnupNQQwKW0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190922_fr&n=3)
What happens when Donald Trump doesn’t learn that actions have consequences? He turns right around and does them again — **and asking for foreign interference in our elections is no different.**
Don’t believe us? The President’s personal lawyer admitted as much on national tv last night!
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDlQU01ZWylsxnupNQQwKW0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190922_fr&n=4)
In 2016, President Trump went up on stage and asked Russia to hack Hillary Clinton’s emails — and they did.
**And now in 2019, he’s trying to use his power in office as leverage to convince another foreign country to interfere in our presidential elections on his behalf.**
This is just another example of why we need to do everything in our power to make Donald Trump a one-term president. **His self-serving actions as President of the United States are destroying the fabric of our democracy and the integrity of our electoral process.**
[**We’ve got to stop him now before it’s too late. Can you chip in $20.20 to help us build the movement we need to kick this corrupt president out of office?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDlQU01ZWylsxnupNQQwKW0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190922_fr&n=5)
Team Weld
| [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDlQU01ZWylsxnupNQQwKW0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190922_fr&n=6)
---
Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.weld2020.org/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190922_fr&n=7).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190922_fr&n=8) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190922_fr&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190922_fr&n=10), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: 📈 Building momentum
body:
| | | |
---
[ ](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=4bc799c1d7&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=282dd3de97&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
We went to _**30**_ county fairs this summer and spoke to thousands of Iowans about issues affecting their lives. Check out this video from the last fair in Clay County!
|
---
| | | | [](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=3d24687963&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
[](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=8d906fc287&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
[](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=b185cede24&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
| | |
### [🎪](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=bf6f1aa344&e=3cee88c8ab) FAIR SEASON FAREWELL [🎪](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=663e6cb168&e=3cee88c8ab)

Hi

I've had a busy, busy summer.

We went to _**30**_ county fairs, spoke to _**1000s**_ of Iowans, and collected almost _**4000 signatures**_ to become the _first and only candidate on the ballot_.

The grassroots support I've felt at every meeting across the district has been incredible. We are gaining momentum as we head into the harvest season, but we need your help.

We _NEED_ your support to keep the momentum going, the campaign van moving, and get our message heard by as many Iowans as possible.

Consider donating [$1](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=66ee49adb1&e=3cee88c8ab), [$5](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=4d163c3898&e=3cee88c8ab), [$20](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=bc15287666&e=3cee88c8ab), or maybe even [$50](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=7a6b32ec3b&e=3cee88c8ab). After two decades running a small business, I know the value of a dollar so I won't be wasting a _single_ _cent_. But we can only do this with your blessing.

Take a look at this newsletter to see what we've been up to last week and check out some of the events ahead. I'll be keeping in touch.

Your neighbor,

---
| | RECENT COVERAGE
---
| | [ ](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=f384f38c96&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
[](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=087c6d2f75&e=3cee88c8ab)
_"We’ve been going around from county to county hosting events and meeting with Iowans. It’s important to hear what Iowans want from their leaders, and to listen to them.”_
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=37c3ad53d5&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
[](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=df20cefa9b&e=3cee88c8ab)
_"Iowans know how to fix immigration. Iowans know what to do with healthcare. Iowans actually have answers for all of the problems that the politicians never seem to fix."_
---
| | BUILDING OUR NETWORK
---
|
---
Warm receptions across the district as I visited the [Kossuth County Right to Life](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=95aa242d29&e=3cee88c8ab) in Algona, the [ABATE District 10](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=3162e2f1c2&e=3cee88c8ab) in Rolfe, the [Palo Alto County GOP](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=5ad32fe170&e=3cee88c8ab) in Emmetsburg, and the [Dickinson County GOP](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=a3c39803f6&e=3cee88c8ab) in Spirit Lake! Whether it's protecting the sanctity of life, enhancing personal freedom, or driving down healthcare costs, the professional politicians just can't finish the job. We need less Washington in Iowa and more of the Iowa way in Washington.

I also made [a prediction](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=a847481767&e=3cee88c8ab) that the Hawks would beat the Cyclones at College AmesDay. I'll tell it to you straight. I'm not a career politician so I'm willing to take risks.
My guess: 13-9. Final score: 18-17. Just a bit off...
|
---
---
| | BURGERS WITH BRET!
---
|
---
Two terrific Burgers with Bret this week in Audubon and Cherokee! Thank you to all who came out to speak with me about the future of our state.

Politics should be about connecting with one another and solving problems over burgers and hot dogs, not political bickering. But are the career politicians ever going to listen? No. So send in your neighbor instead.
|
---
---
| | UP NEXT
---
| |
---
This week, we'll be gathering with the Hancock County GOP at their central committee meeting.

We'll also attend the Greene County GOP's monthly meeting.

---
| | YOUR SUPPORT
---
| [ ](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=2265d2e97f&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
[ ](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=07bb5e0583&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
| | [Donate $20.20 during September and receive a campaign t-shirt as our gift to you!](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=7fa65aea57&e=3cee88c8ab)
---
| | We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Even if you're unable to [donate](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=dd1e650f2e&e=3cee88c8ab) we still need your help.

Would you be willing to put up a yard or barn sign? Want to serve as a county co-chair? Do you know others who might want to join our team?
Send us an email at [info@richardsforcongress.com ](mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com)to lend a hand.

And lastly, like and follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=31a1dfbf99&e=3cee88c8ab), [Twitter](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=fba1958839&e=3cee88c8ab), and [Instagram](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=450f8f50d8&e=3cee88c8ab)!
---
| | |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Richards for Congress
P.O. Box 293
Irwin, IA 51446-0293

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=7d99180ded&e=3cee88c8ab) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=7d99180ded&e=3cee88c8ab&c=430526ccd8).

name: Team Warren
subject: Will you be on our Digital Grassroots Donor Wall?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Grassroots donors have built this movement brick by brick since day one. And now we're introducing a new way to thank them: with our Digital Grassroots Donor Wall. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529848/45c30650/134de7ddb/668adf88/3617055570/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Grassroots donors have built this movement brick by brick since day one. And now we're introducing a new way to thank them: with our Digital Grassroots Donor Wall.

You might remember seeing pictures of the Grassroots Donor Wall here in HQ, with the names of donors printed across our office. Our wall is a physical reminder of how we power this movement. Not from super PACs, Washington lobbyists, or fossil fuel companies -- every spot on the wall is owned by supporters who pitch in whatever they can afford.

But we also want every grassroots donor to be able to find their name as part of this movement at any time -- to pull it up at home, or to show friends and family on the go.

**That's why we're introducing our Digital Grassroots Donor Wall -- a place on our website with the names of every grassroots donor who's chipped in to build this movement. Each donor receives a unique link and code to find their spot on the wall, and we'd love to send you yours. **

[**Donate any amount today to add your name to the Digital Grassroots Donor Wall and keep an eye out for an email with your unique code!**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529848/45c30650/134de7ddb/668adf8b/3617055570/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo3MkZfR0RXX0dEV19UXzIwMTkwOTIyX1YxUzNfUF9UMiJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/grassroots-donor-wall?source=EMJ72F_GDW_GDW_T_20190922_V1S3_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326") [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529848/45c30650/134de7ddb/668adf8a/3617055570/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWdyYXNzcm9vdHMtZG9ub3Itd2FsbC13ZWIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSjcyRl9HRFdfR0RXX1RfMjAxOTA5MjJfVjFTM19QX1QyIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-grassroots-donor-wall-web?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ72F_GDW_GDW_T_20190922_V1S3_P_T2") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: Grassroots donors have built this movement brick by brick since day one. And now we're introducing a new way to thank them: with our Digital Grassroots Donor Wall. | | | "" Grassroots donors have built this movement brick by brick since day one. And now we're introducing a new way to thank them: with our Digital Grassroots Donor Wall. You might remember seeing pictures of the Grassroots Donor Wall here in HQ, with the names of donors printed across our office. Our wall is a physical reminder of how we power this movement. Not from super PACs, Washington lobbyists, or fossil fuel companies -- every spot on the wall is owned by supporters who pitch in whatever they can afford. But we also want every grassroots donor to be able to find their name as part of this movement at any time -- to pull it up at home, or to show friends and family on the go. That's why we're introducing our Digital Grassroots Donor Wall -- a place on our website with the names of every grassroots donor who's chipped in to build this movement. Each donor receives a unique link and code to find their spot on the wall, and we'd love to send you yours. "" "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Elizabeth is in this fight without super PAC money or federal lobbyist contributions because grassroots donors have made it possible. We'll make big, structural change happen by adding one name at a time, and your first contribution today would make a real difference as we near our September FEC fundraising deadline. | Peter, I don’t have to tell you how important this race is. All eyes are on Georgia as Democrats pour millions into this race to keep the 6th district blue. That is why I am reaching out to you. As one of Brandon’s strongest supporters, we need your help to #TakeBackTheSixth. We have the early momentum in this campaign, as we led the GOP field in money raised last quarter. But we need to **finish strong** as we head towards the end of September deadline. [**Are you able to pitch in $50**](https://brandonbeach.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyhtttl-udyuidthb-j/) to help us keep building momentum? Brandon is ready to take his bold ideas to Washington, but we must meet our crucial end of quarter fundraising goal. Now is the time to pitch in and help Brandon however we can. Team Beach appreciates your help! Cam Cameron
Campaign Manager [Donate](https://brandonbeach.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdyhtttl-udyuidthb-t/) |

We have a problem with our system — money is what usually wins elections. Well, last election I was outspent 4 to 1 and we closed a 19% gap to just 4%. We did that because we inspired people to get out to the polls and fight for our shared values. This election, we are going to win. But, we need your support to help us raise the funds to finish the job. **[We have just 7 days to hit our goal! clean_body: Peter, We are just one week away from an important deadline and I need your help so we can post the strongest numbers possible! We have a problem with our system — money is what usually wins elections. Well, last election I was outspent 4 to 1 and we closed a 19% gap to just 4%. We did that because we inspired people to get out to the polls and fight for our shared values. This election, we are going to win. But, we need your support to help us raise the funds to finish the job. Our system is broken. We are running against the third richest member of Congress — worth $300 million dollars. I am running for the House to represent the people, not corporate interests. That is why I am rejecting corporate PAC money. Because of that, I need your support more than ever. Our campaign relies on small dollar donations from teachers, state workers, retirees, and people who have been left behind by the political system. For the people, Mike Siegel ** PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: We need flood mitigation.
body:
** Peter,

Marc wants to lead the fight for flood mitigation.
------------------------------------------------------------

All too soon, our community is reliving the horrors of Hurricane Harvey. Too frequently, Houston is under water. We need more than just the money to rebuild every few years; we need to establish and enforce regional infrastructure regulations and bring the billions of dollars to our community that will impact flood mitigation for generations to come, and help to avoid further destruction.
Help us protect our city before the deadline in 7 days! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=96408f76d4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_21_12_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-96408f76d4-32267927)

** Despite the recent flooding, we...
------------------------------------------------------------
Made it out to block walk, and were able to participate in the Houston Climate Strike. A leader's job doesn't stop when the weather is bad!
We need people to show up.

It is essential that we have someone in office who is able to get the job done. Marc is going to show up, and to do so, he needs you to show up. Please volunteer (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=96408f76d4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_21_12_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-96408f76d4-32267927) an hour of your time today!

Help us make a difference! (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=96408f76d4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_21_12_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-96408f76d4-32267927)
Thank you for your continued support and contributions! You are what drives our campaign forward! Be sure to donate $20 (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=96408f76d4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_21_12_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-96408f76d4-32267927) so Marc and his team can spend their time speaking with voters and earning their votes!
Donate $20 today! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=96408f76d4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_21_12_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-96408f76d4-32267927)
Thank you,

Marc Flores

name: Juliana Bergeron
subject: 2020 Republican Victory Kick-Off
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjUxNDIxMzI0MDYwOTIzNjMwJmM9aTZmMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzkxNTIwOTQmZD16OHAweTFk.s0DStVyF2jT6AW5v_Icngr-U8DUKkuOboSNgb0fIheU)
| | |
---
| Derek, We are excited to announce our 2020 Republican Victory Kick-Off event featuring **Congressman Jason Chaffetz** , and [we want you to be there!](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjUxNDIxMzI0MDYwOTIzNjMwJmM9aTZmMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzkxNTIwOTYmZD1kNmUzeDFs.49tqU9yGnS-KSp1MqC_xIJtZPJcfcZ_8-ewQ4e4nxUM)

---
| |
---
| We are going to have a really fantastic time while raising critical dollars to elect Republicans up-and-down the ballot next November. Planning to join us? Seating is limited, [secure your ticket online today.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjUxNDIxMzI0MDYwOTIzNjMwJmM9aTZmMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzkxNTIxMDAmZD13NXY5YjZ4.BJX0wxl4DJXxCGNns8hrbp0UVQn8ZdAiiiOkMnZsKvA) Tickets are $60 and we will sell out \- Join us at the Hotel Concord in order to help us take back the State of New Hampshire. The House and the Senate have stood behind Governor Sununu and his vetoes, but we need to [send reinforcements to Concord](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjUxNDIxMzI0MDYwOTIzNjMwJmM9aTZmMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzkxNTIxMDImZD11N3Yzajh4.80l_vKnrbiwIzt42PuJtJWzLJn2H9EKjL7Zn5x9YCkU) in 2020 to get good Republican policies passed. [Hope to see you there! Make sure you get your tickets today.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjUxNDIxMzI0MDYwOTIzNjMwJmM9aTZmMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzkxNTIxMDQmZD1sMW41ZzRk.vdF6Um4kea4JMTPXkW-iJfS7FCCDUE6r_1iKgeQ9Kg4) Sincerely, Juliana Bergeron
RNC National Committeewoman - New Hampshire

name: Laura Loomer
subject: In Seven Days . . .
body:
This is unbelievable! We are SO CLOSE to meeting our fundraising goal and I can’t wait to show Nancy Pelosi, Ilhan Omar and the rest of the “Squad” -- and of course my opponent Democrat Lois Frankel -- that “Laura Loomer for Congress” is VERY real.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348518-807697-4656045-4a120328de-08bb8de04b)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348518-807697-4656044-757ecb098a-08bb8de04b) This is unbelievable!

We are SO CLOSE to meeting our fundraising goal and I can’t wait to show Nancy Pelosi, Ilhan Omar and the rest of the “Squad” -- and of course my opponent Democrat Lois Frankel -- that “Laura Loomer for Congress” is VERY real.

With the help of liberal reporters, Democrats have convinced themselves that my run for Florida’s 21st Congressional seat is just a stunt.

They think I’m doing it for attention.

They even think I’m doing it just to get my Twitter account back . . . which is laughable.

But in seven days, when we hit the first FEC filing deadline for our campaign, they’ll realize that not only is my race real,**but it’s competitive!**

[**Help me hit our first quarter goal by donating today.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348518-807697-4656044-757ecb098a-08bb8de04b)

This campaign is forced to be “old school” in that I’m banned from every major social media platform.

That means we’ll have to raise and spend significantly more money than any other congressional candidate running in 2020.

And the only way to do that is [**with your continued support**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348518-807697-4656044-757ecb098a-08bb8de04b).

With the FEC filing deadline quickly approaching on September 30th, I’m determined to hit our internal fundraising goal and I know we can do it by the deadline!

Here’s the crazy thing, I can’t even share my fundraising goal with you because as you’re reading this, liberal reporters are doing the same.

If we come up short by just one copper penny – they’ll scream “FAILURE!”

But I’m confident that we’ll hit this goal with your help that I am so grateful for.

So please if you can, [**donate before our filing deadline that’s quickly approaching**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348518-807697-4656044-757ecb098a-08bb8de04b).

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-348518-807697-84585d41bbe610b-08bb8de04b)

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Newt Gingrich Touts Our Campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich recently talked about our campaign in Newsweek. I’m proud that our campaign was one of only seven Speaker Gingrich highlighted from across the country.
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dmKqJrY1SRbiP9k5uEqB3hqHf9TE89P9LztaASwAwM__PV5QyOzuW2ggw3Cq3rfGabhzCjjkhbJqYaFtzJfspRzVuvkWBng_fdAQmXjQ30LXJjH2zBJpDlLGYg7YItjpGVRj5yqPUIZ8O7DFSKTw5A==&c=ZK46MFXmHoUsz33IVQDYFeiHu60klcjiPSiafmoeg7HkSxsQ1nrPVg==&ch=nRFgjvSbAhAseL5q_dlkLur5bzTRhcQuc3jaagYMOAbyms8kG8_e1g==)
---
| Friend,
Former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich recently talked about our campaign in Newsweek.
In an article entitled "Liberals--Before you celebrate Republicans Retiring, take a look at the firebrands lining up for 2020," Speaker Gingrich said Republicans have recruited an exciting group of candidates who will "breathe a great deal of new life into--and bring many new ideas to--Washington in a new Republican Majority."

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important -- will you help our campaign reach our goals before the September FEC deadline?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
A week from today, we'll hit the next FEC fundraising deadline. Whether or not we reach our targets will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529859/45c30650/134cbc776/668ac936/3840433065/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Our campaign is facing a powerfully important test.

A week from today, we'll hit the next FEC fundraising deadline. Whether or not we reach our targets will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward.

The pressure is on. Our campaign is working hard to hit our ambitious goal for this quarter. But here's what you're not going to see me do:

You won't see me holding any fundraisers where only the wealthy can get in by writing a big check.

You won't see me chatting up any billionaires, asking them to fund a Super PAC.

And you definitely won't see me taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests.

**There's only one way we're raising money on this campaign, and it's with grassroots donors. We're building a movement to fight for working people and we're making sure we answer only to working people.**

>
We know the big problems we're up against.

And we know that we need big, structural change to solve those problems.

We need to get organized -- person to person, face to face -- by investing in grassroots, on-the-ground community-building across the country. And we need to lay out big plans to solve real problems.

That's the only way to win in 2020, and we've gotten started. But, we need real resources to keep growing our movement.

**Before the FEC deadline next week, we need to get our fundraising numbers in the best place possible.**

[**I can't thank you enough for everything you do as a member of this team, and I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important. Elizabeth

Whether or not we reach our targets will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward. | | | "" Our campaign is facing a powerfully important test. A week from today, we'll hit the next FEC fundraising deadline. Whether or not we reach our targets will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward. The pressure is on. Our campaign is working hard to hit our ambitious goal for this quarter. But here's what you're not going to see me do: You won't see me holding any fundraisers where only the wealthy can get in by writing a big check. You won't see me chatting up any billionaires, asking them to fund a Super PAC. And you definitely won't see me taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests. There's only one way we're raising money on this campaign, and it's with grassroots donors. We're building a movement to fight for working people and we're making sure we answer only to working people. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: #MoscowMitch closes the FEC just in time for the 2020 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The number of Federal Election Commission (FEC) commissioners dropped to 3 at the end of August, bringing the nation's election regulatory body below the stipulated quorum of 4. They now cannot hold meetings, issue fines, or clarify rules that keep our elections as fair as possible \-- opening the door for campaigns to ignore finance regulations and accept endless amounts of money without fear of repercussions. Foreign governments will have an easier time interfering in the 2020 presidential elections and GOP dark money will flow freely. This is no accident \-- it's part of a carefully orchestrated assault on democracy by national Republicans, specifically #MoscowMitch McConnell. He's the one who has stood in the way of campaign finance reform, spearheaded the Citizens United case, and blocked any new appointments to the FEC. He is actively tearing down every protection that props up our democracy and even standing in the way of election protections that would stop Russia from meddling in 2020. If you believe that our country needs a fully functioning FEC and Democrats need to fight back against corrupt politicians like Mitch McConnell, we need your donation NOW. [**If every person reading this email gave just $1, we could give Republicans a run for their corporate PAC money in 2020. Can you help us save the FEC and repair the damage Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP have done to our democracy by donating $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd0f/6e9863e8/14e8cd6f/1db0dabb/2323022038/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190923a.ND&refcode2=anxmm2h6OK79yn0fWJi6") Thank you for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd0f/6e9863e8/14e8cd6f/1db0dab9/2323022038/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190923a.ND&refcode2=anxmm2h6OK79yn0fWJi6")

and why they're so important | |

| |
#
BOTH of Georgia’s Senate seats will be on the ballot next year. FOUR FAR-LEFT Democrats are already running against me. Radical liberal donors are determined to defeat President Trump and end our majority by winning Georgia.

**We have SEVEN DAYS to show we’re ready for the fight.** At the end of the month, our fundraising number goes public. I’m personally asking each of our supporters to help us hit our goal.

[**Will you chip in whatever you can afford RIGHT NOW?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=996960d2ec&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [DONATE NOW >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2e49f21ee8&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW >>>")
---
| **Our Democrat opponents, the national liberal media, and radical donors around the country will know if we fall short of our goal for this fundraising quarter.** They have their eyes on Georgia, and they’re looking for any sign of weakness.

[**It’s pivotal we show them we’re ready for whatever they send our way.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=f38a65dc5f&e=02cd889ad3)

Let’s be clear: The battle for the White House and Senate will be decided in Georgia. We’re now on the frontlines of stopping the Democrats’ radical socialist agenda.

Failure isn’t an option, but we can’t win unless we hit our fundraising goals. I’m counting on your help to make sure our campaign has the financial resources it takes to win.

[**So, please, chip in whatever you can afford right now.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=bd24680510&e=02cd889ad3)It’s absolutely critical that we hit our goal for this fundraising deadline.

Thank you for everything.

David Perdue

name: Mike Franken
subject: Deadlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Can you donate to our campaign ahead of our first quarterly deadline? Insiders will be scrutinizing the amount of money we raise and the number of supporters we get.
|
---

| | Friend, I need to chat about deadlines, please. **One week from today is our first Federal Election Commission filing deadline for this campaign.** At midnight on September 30, we'll need to report how much money we've raised during our launch period. Everyone who is paying attention to this race--from the press to the pundits and even the voters -- will evaluate how well the campaign raises funds which gives an idea of the campaign's future. [**We need to show them what you've shown me -- that we have a top-notch organization that has the power it takes to win. We can do it by raising $50,000 from our grassroots team over the next seven days. Are you in?**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245d/33365068/4a6638ca/3f8bade6/3898479251/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190923_fr_em") | [Contribute today](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245d/33365068/4a6638ca/3f8bade7/3898479251/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190923_fr_em_button")
---
I'm running for Senate because, like you, I'm tired of Trump-era Republicans, like Joni Ernst and Mitch McConnell, who won't stand up to shallow special interests.
It was hard to go against the grain and vote no on the plan for invading Iraq. Doing the right thing is often difficult. To address the climate crisis, the stunning cost of health care, and the smarminess of special interests from Wall Street, we need to get to work and pass effective policy initiatives.
But we send people to Washington because we expect them to act in our interest, to put our community ahead of their political interests, and to do what's right instead of what's convenient or politically expedient.
Those are the values that I learned growing up in rural Iowa. I'll be that kind of senator for the people of Iowa. If I'm going to be elected, it starts by reaching this $50,000 goal.
[**Donate today to help us reach our end of quarter goal. Let's show the D.C. insiders trying to stop this campaign that we're ready to take on this fight and win:**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245d/33365068/4a6638ca/3f8bade6/3898479251/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190923_fr_em")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Donate $3 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245d/33365068/4a6638ca/3f8bade0/3898479251/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=20190923_fr_em_express_lane_3")**
---
[Donate $10 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245d/33365068/4a6638ca/3f8bade1/3898479251/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20190923_fr_em_express_lane_10")
---
[Donate $25 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245d/33365068/4a6638ca/3f8bade2/3898479251/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20190923_fr_em_express_lane_25")

[Other Amount](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245d/33365068/4a6638ca/3f8bade3/3898479251/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken_eoq3_2019?refcode=20190923_fr_em_express_lane_other")

Vice Admiral Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.)
Candidate for United States Senate

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Iowa is stirring
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
[ Andrew ]Andrew Yang for President We're investing heavily in Iowa but we need more resources before Caucus Day! Can you chip in before our big FEC deadline so we can staff up and win? If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/10853?t=1001&amount=5&express_lane=true&akid=634%2E377263%2E0k0cWL ]$5 » [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/10853?t=1007&amount=10&express_lane=true&akid=634%2E377263%2E0k0cWL ]$10 » [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/10853?t=1006&amount=15&express_lane=true&akid=634%2E377263%2E0k0cWL ]$15 » [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/10853?t=1005&amount=20&express_lane=true&akid=634%2E377263%2E0k0cWL ]$20» [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/10853?t=1004&amount=25&express_lane=true&akid=634%2E377263%2E0k0cWL ]$25 » [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/10853?t=1003&express_lane=true&amounts=25&akid=634%2E377263%2E0k0cWL ]OTHER » Hello and thank you for your support! I’m writing this on the way back from Iowa -- this weekend was our best trip yet. On Saturday, I spoke at the Polk County Steak Fry to a group of over 12,000 Iowans. It was an epic experience. [8]Andrew Yang speaking to a crowd of 12,000 Iowans at the Polk County Steak Fry I also fried a few steaks, which were delicious if I do say so myself. [9]Andrew Yang excitedly frying steaks at the Polk County Steak Fry From there, we opened our first offices in the state, in Des Moines and Davenport. The openings drew amazing crowds in both places -- a tremendous sign. I also spoke at a forum for high school students and several open houses hosted by our campaign. CBS, Fox and NowThisNews covered the events. [10]Andrew Yang with a group of young people with the Youth Caucus. [11]Andrew Yang with a group of supporters at the Davenport Office opening [12]Andrew Yang taking a selfie with a supporter I have been coming to Iowa since early 2018. Our growth has been staggering. The crowds are bigger and the enthusiasm is higher than ever. Among the things supporters said to me: “I caucused for Trump. It will be my pleasure to caucus for you.” “I am telling my neighbors all about you. You can do it.” “I was a precinct captain for Obama in ’08. When you see it, you know. You’re going to make history.” [13]A car with a sticker that reads google Andrew Yang [14]Andrew Yang speaking to a group of college students in Iowa Even as the crowds get bigger, our team is growing too. We now have 8 full-time staffers in Iowa and are building out quickly. Several of the new hires are experienced hands who left other campaigns (e.g., Jay Inslee, Tim Ryan) to join us. We are growing just as other campaigns are shrinking, and it’s working to our advantage. There is a lot of noise around a presidential campaign. Press cycles and punditry. Fundraising reports and campaign ads. As an operator, I like to hone in on the key variables for success for an organization and then focus on those. The key variable here is which candidate a subset of ~200,000 Iowans caucus for on February 3rd. About 10% of voters have decided who they’re supporting. 90% don’t know. Anyone who tells you how it’s going to go doesn't know, because the Iowans themselves don’t know. We have given ourselves a chance to be the campaign on the rise just as voters are tuning in; we have recently gone from curiosity to contender. We have the right message and the right vision, and we are growing at the exact right time. This trip convinced me of one thing -- we can compete in Iowa and have thousands of Iowans caucus for us next February. History is opening its door for us. We are going to have to work hard, get the right people on board, and deploy our resources wisely in the state. But if we play our cards right, Iowa will take our vision to the rest of the country and it will spread like wildfire. Imagine the headlines when Andrew Yang finishes among the top contenders in Iowa next February. Millions of Americans will wake up to the fact that we can win. And then, there will be no stopping us. The American people are a sleeping giant. People are waking up. Iowa is stirring and it’s glorious. -Andrew Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is. [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/10853?t=1002&akid=634%2E377263%2E0k0cWL ]DONATE NOW Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang


You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump Wins Big Ohio Manufacturing Investment from Australia's Pratt Industries
body:
"President Trump welcomed Australian Prime Minister Scott Morrison in Wapakoneta, Ohio at Pratt Industries, along with factory owner..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e54dcb8d05&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump Wins Big Ohio Manufacturing Investment from Australia's Pratt Industries**

“President Trump welcomed Australian Prime Minister Scott Morrison in Wapakoneta, Ohio at Pratt Industries, along with factory owner Australian billionaire Anthony Pratt, as he touted an ‘economic revival’ of the manufacturing industry with the promise of more foreign investment and a surge in new jobs,” Suzanne O'Halloran reports for Fox Business.

“We proudly declare Pratt Industries and the great, great state of Ohio open for business . . . Pratt has pledged, as I said, to invest many billions in the United States,” the President said to a “U-S-A”-chanting crowd.

“Pratt is creating 5,000 new jobs, helped in part by Trump's tax cuts which included lowering the corporate tax rate to 21 percent from 35 percent,” O’Halloran writes. “Trump noted foreign companies invested $250 billion in the United States last year alone.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31f4034ea5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| First Lady Melania Trump “rang the opening bell on Wall Street Monday, kicking off a busy week for the first couple in their hometown of New York,” Tom Howell Jr. reports in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=27394071af&e=3ee4985eea). “Mrs. Trump was surrounded by students as she participated in the popular ceremony at the New York Stock Exchange. People on the trading floor whooped and hollered after the bell rang out at 9:30 a.m.”

“The logo of Mrs. Trump’s signature program, ‘Be Best,’ was projected on the wall above them. The initiative encourages children to fulfill their potential, exercise good habits online and avoid bullying and drugs.”
---
|
---
| “U.S. President Donald Trump and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi shared a stage and showered each other with praise on Sunday at a ‘Howdy, Modi!’ rally attended by upward of 50,000 people, a rare mass showing for a foreign leader on American soil,” [_Reuters_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5af08da7fb&e=3ee4985eea) reports. Hailing the U.S.-India relationship, the President called the gathering a “profoundly historic event,” and was greeted with a standing ovation by the Indian-American crowd.
---
|
---
| Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump is taking her signature push for women's rights and women's empowerment, the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative (WGDP), to an audience of global thought leaders today at the Concordia Annual Summit, Savannah Behrmann reports for [_**USA Today**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=439d8d6421&e=3ee4985eea). After discussing the initiative with Concordia CEO Matt Swift this morning, Ms. Trump will attend “a separate event that highlights participants in a international leadership program of the WGDP who are touring the U.S. in order to develop ideas and action plans about women's economic participation in their home countries.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5b954c76c9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf5286e447&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8f479a620d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Where do you stand on impeachment?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

I have said that I support impeachment since August of 2017. It was not
something that I took lightly. But while others said it was politically
dangerous or that we should wait and see how it polls first, I believed
that we had to make it clear that no person in America is above the law
— no matter how high up their position of public trust.

Well this week, more than two years later, we learned another troubling
thing about President Trump’s lawless behavior. New reporting finds that
he pressured the government of Ukraine to dig up dirt on one of his
Democratic opponents. As you know, it’s just the latest in a string of
abuses of power.

Last election, Trump invited Russia to attack our democracy on live
television. When it actually happened, he obstructed the investigation
into it. And when reporter George Stephanopoulos asked him in the Oval
Office if he would accept foreign help once again, Trump said, “I think
I’d take it.”

If we don’t act now, we could very well lose our democracy. We will be
setting the irreversible precedent that presidents can break our laws,
obstruct justice, and still face no consequences.

With the newest revelation about Trump and Ukraine, the question
surrounding impeachment has become even more urgent. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190923/?source=ema20190923-56943&t=1001&akid=56943%2E444211%2Ej9OHTI ]So I need to hear
from you on this today — can you let me know where you stand on impeaching
Donald Trump?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190923/?source=ema20190923-56943&t=1002&akid=56943%2E444211%2Ej9OHTI ]Should Congress move forward with impeachment?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190923/?source=ema20190923-56943&t=1003&akid=56943%2E444211%2Ej9OHTI ]YES

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34927?refcode=ema20190923-56943&t=1004&akid=56943%2E444211%2Ej9OHTI ]NO

I’m hearing from people about this president everywhere I go. He is
threatening our democracy but he is also threatening so much more
— whether it’s our health care, our environment, our communities of
immigrants, our economy, or our safety as he continues to cozy up to the
NRA instead of doing anything to stop the fact that nearly 40,000
Americans die each year from gun violence.

I’m listening to Democrats, Republicans, independents, and folks who
couldn’t care less about political labels. Most people that I meet are
extremely concerned about our lawless president, and they’re wondering why
Congress hasn’t done anything to stop him. I agree, but I want to know if
you do too.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190923/?source=ema20190923-56943&t=1005&akid=56943%2E444211%2Ej9OHTI ]I hope to hear from you today given that this is time sensitive. Let me
know where you stand on impeaching Donald Trump and finally getting some
accountability and justice in our democracy.

Thanks for sharing your thoughts with me today,

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190923footer&t=1006&refcode2=56943_444211_j9OHTI&akid=56943%2E444211%2Ej9OHTI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=56943%2E444211%2Ej9OHTI

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

The incumbent, Republican Ross Spano, is potentially facing MULTIPLE federal investigations for illegally accepting $180,000 last year.

name: Bill Weld
subject: treason, plain and simple
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22_Fd-VzwAxfK4yQaxX8_NdrPx9iRtnx9qPBHUugKNprtJ5zMJI5x9Bg6cw9jbf6sg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190923_1&n=1) Team —**President Trump committed treason, plain and simple.** And I said as much on _Morning Joe_ this morning. [](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22_Fd-VzwAxfK4yQaxX8_NdrPx9iRtnx9qPBHUugKNprtJ5zMJI5x9Bg6cw9jbf6sg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190923_1&n=2) First, he canceled millions of dollars in aid to Ukraine, then he called up the Ukrainian President and **demanded multiple times that he investigate his political opponent and interfere in the 2020 elections on his behalf.** Not only does this move undermine our democratic process and institutions, **it’s treason.** The American people deserve better than a president who is willing to ask foreign countries to interfere in our sacred democratic process, and we’re running because we want to give our nation the chance to vote for the principled, conservative leadership they are looking for. **But if we’re going to continue our fight to make Donald Trump a one-term president, we’re going to need your help.** Next week marks an important deadline for the campaign, the end of the fiscal quarter. It’s important because we have to report our fundraising numbers to the FEC and that report will become public. _The media will use this report to determine how viable our challenge to President Trump is._ **We’ve been making huge strides on the ground, and we’ve clearly got the attention of President Trump and his campaign, but we need a strong showing on our next FEC report if we want to keep the pressure on him.** [**Can you help us by making a contribution of $20.20 today?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22_Fd-VzwAxfK4yQaxX8_NdrPx9iRtnx9qPBHUugKNprtJ5zMJI5x9Bg6cw9jbf6sg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190923_1&n=3) Thank you for your continued generosity and support. It’s because of supporters like you that we're able to keep this campaign going. — Bill | | [DONATE ➞](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22_Fd-VzwAxfK4yQaxX8_NdrPx9iRtnx9qPBHUugKNprtJ5zMJI5x9Bg6cw9jbf6sg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190923_1&n=4)
---

name: Sara Gideon
subject: This is why I'm rejecting all corporate PAC donations to my campaign:
body:
Follow the money.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c41/4bef7a87/6898f612/287f32e2/446046550/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
No matter what issue brings you to this fight - whether it's healthcare, or climate change, or protecting a woman's right to choose - we can all agree on one thing:
**Money in politics is part of the problem.**
Special interest groups can sway our representatives with huge campaign donations. It's not just morally wrong - it's also a big part of the reason we're not seeing progress on the issues we care about in Washington.
I for one am sick and tired of the influence money has over our candidates and elections. That's why I made the decision to **reject all corporate PAC donations** to my campaign.
I'm proud of that commitment, but it means that I occasionally need to reach out to my supporters for help. With just _one week left_ until our FEC fundraising deadline, today is one of those days.
[**Make a $3 contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate today. I can 't defeat Susan Collins alone, so I need to know you're with me in this difficult fight.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c41/4bef7a87/6898f612/287f32e1/446046550/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjMtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190923-2-full")
Mainers are ready for a leader who puts our state before special interests and corporate PACs. I promise I will do that every single day, both as a candidate, and as U.S. Senator.
You can count on me, and I hope I can count on you too with this important FEC deadline just days away.
All my best,
_Sara_
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c41/4bef7a87/6898f612/287f32e1/446046550/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjMtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190923-2-full")**

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c41/4bef7a87/6898f612/287f32e0/446046550/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c41/4bef7a87/6898f612/287f32e7/446046550/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Al Sharpton had it coming to him
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
When the Democrats called on Al Sharpton to testify before the House Judiciary Committee they were in for a rude awakening. There was no chance that I would stand by and let this racist and anti-Semitic 'leader' off the hook. The fact that he even appeared before our committee is a mockery of our political system. Shame on Jerry Nadler and the House Democrats for allowing this to happen.
Have you seen this?
---
| GOP Rep. Matt Gaetz, Al Sharpton clash over anti-Semitism accusations as police brutality hearing goes off rails
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qKkg6Bg-d4NjxMOR-QRyP23WzLuLug7er8VywBZbNn3L53DlmMDruFW-R-BgXHrd_F3oHdsCbURMYVWvvwHd_C-cq9TMAKPHtUD6M-2YBN7OXNmKXIOTY_zybyeWv5qmVhEcdR_232sRpekfie1Bc3jeABwxKFAEQqFon5PKNQvYlLivG48-tHr0yskhX8RgFris1MFQr0Dz6yWqTP8BCYQEQMbQG5l5vHZ89wJ5fF2jwauqz6qH3ATl7lc_LH0SnmesE2KbaN4EkAmHplFiZxreCP68_JL7YKkeVdrBRhrh6QzctuVwUw==&c=m0P-NLhedlY-wXLLUcHp0wg5Ipoj0Uj9nDmiDAkMQDRnfuFifNk2hA==&ch=Fqp1mydKY-Lz6927ipCEL9I6N9uFPNEA0qi85MTsvHo350jps_vqMQ==)
---
| Transcript
Gaetz: "Have you ever referred to African Americans that disagreed with you as 'cocktail-sip negroes'?" Reverend Al Sharpton: "I have." Gaetz: "Have you said 'I am in hell already, I am in Israel'?'" Mr. Sharpton: "Yes."
Congressman Gaetz: Have you ever referred to members of the Jewish faith as "white interlopers" or "diamond merchants"? Mr. Sharpton: No sir I referred to one in Harlem, an individual. Congressman Gaetz: Have you ever referred to African Americans who disagreed with you as "yellow," and then the N-word? Mr. Sharpton: I don't know that I have...I've referred to people as names.

The Democrats love to praise Al Sharpton as a voice for the oppressed. Unfortunately, he is selectively oppressive to different groups of people including African Americans and people of the Jewish faith.
The Democrats hypocrisy is so thick you can cut it with a knife, and we need to get that message across to them. [Will you help me send that message far and wide?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qKkg6Bg-d4NjxMOR-QRyP23WzLuLug7er8VywBZbNn3L53DlmMDruFW-R-BgXHrd7W0Ry08JZCj9zt3qhTWxukJlHysicg8_UaGLyfdPBAb3mD7HuLBm9MWzW2jB4YOQ_tCJcTxrsiWmAUdm5v7EE3nwLnAt8IMLQ5okGUuZe6s=&c=m0P-NLhedlY-wXLLUcHp0wg5Ipoj0Uj9nDmiDAkMQDRnfuFifNk2hA==&ch=Fqp1mydKY-Lz6927ipCEL9I6N9uFPNEA0qi85MTsvHo350jps_vqMQ==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Patriot, When the Democrats called on Al Sharpton to testify before the House Judiciary Committee they were in for a rude awakening. There was no chance that I would stand by and let this racist and anti-Semitic 'leader' off the hook. The fact that he even appeared before our committee is a mockery of our political system. Shame on Jerry Nadler and the House Democrats for allowing this to happen. Have you seen this? | GOP Rep. Matt Gaetz, Al Sharpton clash over anti-Semitism accusations as police brutality hearing goes off rails | == | Transcript Gaetz: "Have you ever referred to African Americans that disagreed with you as 'cocktail-sip negroes'?" Reverend Al Sharpton: "I have." Gaetz: "Have you said 'I am in hell already, I am in Israel'?'" Mr. Sharpton: "Yes." Congressman Gaetz: Have you ever referred to members of the Jewish faith as "white interlopers" or "diamond merchants"? Mr. Sharpton: No sir I referred to one in Harlem, an individual. Congressman Gaetz: Have you ever referred to African Americans who disagreed with you as "yellow," and then the N-word? Mr. Sharpton: I don't know that I have...I've referred to people as names. The Democrats love to praise Al Sharpton as a voice for the oppressed. Unfortunately, he is selectively oppressive to different groups of people including African Americans and people of the Jewish faith. The Democrats hypocrisy is so thick you can cut it with a knife, and we need to get that message across to them. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Shame on Jerry Nadler and Al Sharpton, | | Matt Gaetz | | | == | | | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2019 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We need gun safety laws, and we need them NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Americans are tired of hearing story after story about another shooting, another killing, another senseless death. Brutal gun violence has plagued our country for far too long and destroyed far too many communities, and yet, we're still waiting for our lawmakers to do anything. Democrats in the House have passed major gun safety reforms, but they have gone nowhere in the Senate as Mitch McConnell would rather watch Americans die and pocket checks from the NRA than actually help. [**Please, add your name to ours! Show Congress that the American people want an end to this crisis and that our voices are more powerful than the NRA and the gun lobby. Tell them to pass critical gun reform legislation for a safer future for us and our children.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd30/6e9863e8/14ea0fca/1db0dae0/2594662074/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/congressgun/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd30/6e9863e8/14ea0fca/1db0dae0/2594662074/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/congressgun/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

body:
10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: Do you want Trump to flip New Mexico red and take it away from Democrats?
---
| | **I 'm just 2,379 poll responses away from SINKING Trump's approval -- but I don't have your response yet.** _**[I 'm asking because this is critical. I will NOT let Trump take New Mexico away from Democrats. I need you to help me sink his approval. Will you rush your response to my Trump Approval Poll before midnight? >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b49f/18e32a7f/53390862/7bf67454/4109411906/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/trump-approval-survey2?source=20190923_em_pet_b1_tapv_all_rs")**_ -BRL \-- Forwarded Message -- | **OFFICIAL TRUMP APPROVAL POLL** **FOR:** dpwillis67@gmail.com We just learned Republicans' data now shows Trump could FLIP New Mexico red. _No!!_ Ben Ray just launched his emergency poll to REVERSE these numbers and PROTECT this critical state. 10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: Do you want Trump to flip New Mexico red and take it away from Democrats? _[**_NO WAY!! >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b49f/18e32a7f/53390862/7bf67454/4109411906/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/trump-approval-survey2?source=20190923_em_pet_b1_tapv_all_rs")_** _**[_Yes_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b49f/18e32a7f/53390862/7bf67454/4109411906/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/trump-approval-survey2?source=20190923_em_pet_b1_tapv_all_rs")**_**
---

We need your immediate attention:

Trump just held a massive, anti-Democratic rally here in New Mexico.

He promised to FLIP this state red and take it from Democrats.

Now, we're learning that Republicans' internal data is shifting. **They think PresidentTrump can actually win our state.**

So Ben Ray just launched his emergency Trump Approval Poll to fix this.

_**[He needs 10,000 anti-Trump responses before midnight to COUNTER Republicans ' data and prove that we will NEVER let Trump win this state. He needs Democrats all over the country to have our back right now. Will you take his emergency poll before midnight? >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b49f/18e32a7f/53390862/7bf67454/4109411906/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/trump-approval-survey2?source=20190923_em_pet_b1_tapv_all_rs")**_

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b49f/18e32a7f/53390862/7bf67455/4109411906/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b49f/18e32a7f/53390862/7bf6744a/4109411906/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b49f/18e32a7f/53390862/7bf6744b/4109411906/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b49f/18e32a7f/53390862/7bf67448/4109411906/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b49f/18e32a7f/53390862/7bf67449/4109411906/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b49f/18e32a7f/53390862/7bf6744e/4109411906/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: rapidresponse@andybeshear.com
subject: Can't let this stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
You've probably seen them by now. The nasty smears against Andy Beshear are running constantly. They're not true, and Matt Bevin knows this.
|
---

| | Peter:

You've probably seen them by now. The nasty smears against Andy Beshear are running constantly. They're not true, and Matt Bevin knows this.

But he doesn't care. His only chance at winning is to divide and scare Kentuckians, regardless of the truth.

We will not let these vicious lies stand. That's **why we 're launching our 24 hour Rapid Response Fund. We need to raise $10,000 immediately to stay on track to respond to these attacks. Grassroots donors are the only people who make this campaign possible.

Not wealthy donors, who usually cut big checks and call the shots -- we don't host any exclusive events for them.

Not federal lobbyists or corporate PACs, who have a wish list for the next president -- we don't take a dime from any of them, either.

As president, Elizabeth won't owe any favors to any powerful special interests -- because she's not powered by them, she's powered by you. **And right now, we 're relying on this community to help beat our end-of-quarter fundraising goal to guarantee we'll have all the resources we need in the busy months ahead.**

**[Your support is incredibly important right now. Before the FEC deadline, will you chip in for the first time to power this movement for big, structural change?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529877/45c30650/134bdd75c/668ae150/4106847137/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KODNGX0VPUV9ORkZfV18yMDE5MDkyM19WMVMyIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ83F_EOQ_NFF_W_20190923_V1S2")**

>
As Elizabeth always says, you don't get what you don't fight for.

So that's why this team dreams big -- for bold ideas to level the playing field for working people. And we fight hard for those ideas -- side by side as a grassroots movement.

We've got a plan to bring big, structural change to Washington.

**But first, there 's one plan that makes all of the other plans possible: beating our end-of-quarter fundraising goal before September 30.**

We're going to take power away from the big banks, giant corporations, and powerful special interests. We'll put it in the hands of the people -- there's more of us than there are of them.

We've got a plan. But it comes down to emails like this one adding up to enough resources to keep growing our movement in Pennsylvania and across the country.

**[Thanks for everything you do as a member of this grassroots team. Please make your first contribution today to beat this fundraising goal and keep up the fight.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529877/45c30650/134bdd75c/668ae150/4106847137/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KODNGX0VPUV9ORkZfV18yMDE5MDkyM19WMVMyIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ83F_EOQ_NFF_W_20190923_V1S2")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

body:
A direct quote ->
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa217/18d6a294/4cffa284/26d64975/28030909/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | One of James' opponents, Bill Hagerty, is in this race for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell -- not Tennesseans. Seriously **\-- check out this direct quote from one of his fundraising letters:** | | "Join President Trump and Mitch by making a generous donation right now."
---
[_**Let 's show them what this race is really about: Make a generous donation to _James ' _campaign and help elect a leader who's in it for the right reasons.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa217/18d6a294/4cffa284/26d64972/28030909/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190923?refcode=jme190923_m&recurring=true")
There's no doubt about it -- Hagerty has the wrong priorities:
* He's an **anti-choice extremist.**
* He bought himself a diplomatic post after **bundling money for Trump 's 2016 campaign.**
* In his campaign announcement video, he says **Trump-appointed Justice Brett Kavanaugh is the kind of judge he'd vote for.**
* He's ready to be**a rubber stamp for the dangerous Trump-McConnell agenda.**

If our opponent cared about Tennesseans first and foremost, he wouldn't be bragging about Trump's support, because **the fact of the matter is the president 's agenda -- from rural hospital closures to his trade war -- has made life harder for Tennesseans.**
[_**Chip in to help elect a senator who will put Tennesseans first -- not Washington insiders and special interests with all their partisan political agendas.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa217/18d6a294/4cffa284/26d64972/28030909/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190923?refcode=jme190923_m&recurring=true")

name: Cory Booker
subject: The DNC has raised the debate stage threshold again, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- **Moments ago, the DNC raised the debate stage threshold to 165,000 unique donors.** That means in order for me to be on the debate stage in November, we need to grow this grassroots team by the thousands. **[I know we can do this with your help. Please chip in today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190923_CB_20190923-fr-CB-165k-ndnr_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=1,5,10,22,50")** This new 165,000 donor threshold underscores the reason we're being radically transparent with you. The bar in this race has gotten higher and it will continue to. It's not just the DNC threshold -- our campaign needs to scale up to have a chance to stay in this race and compete to win the nomination. **That 's why we need your help.** It's more important than ever before to join our team and make sure our collective voices are heard on the national stage. **[Can you chip in $1 for the first time and become a debate stage donor?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190923_CB_20190923-fr-CB-165k-ndnr_ndnr_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=1,5,10,22,50")** I'll be honest team: **We don 't have 165,000 individual donors yet.** This is a crowded Democratic primary, and debates offer some of the only opportunities for an underdog campaign like ours to break through -- to get a chance to compete on a level playing field with those other campaigns that are raising tens of millions of dollars. Debates are a chance to discuss our shared values -- criminal justice reform, universal health care, bold plans to tackle gun violence, reproductive justice, and legalization of marijuana at a federal level to name a few. It's no secret that our campaign is an underdog in the race. I'm used to being counted out -- we've seen it before when I ran for mayor of Newark. And we were doubted when we took on big challenges in the Senate. But we've always come together to win. **Can you chip in today to help me qualify for future debates?** | If you've saved your payment information with
ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:

| | Okay. Here's the update on September's online grassroots goal: we have $41,030 left to raise before the end of the month to support Senator Merkley's re-election campaign. Here's the awesome news. I just spoke with a strong progressive supporter of Jeff's and **she and her husband have agreed to match the next $9,135 in grassroots donations.** [**Donate today. name: Greg Stanton
subject: Will you join me on Saturday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**On Saturday, our team is hosting a final deadline fundraiser at one of Phoenix 's preeminent venues, The Farm at South Mountain, and I hope you can join us!**

The full details for the event, which will take place from 5:30-7:30pm on Saturday, are on the invite below.

We need to have an accurate count of who all to expect, so please [**RSVP**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gf0rNvNpMxKqFnPlc2R7IVfEF7IDjsY6659K3S1TnwY=/jjGH1A0Kap-dD7Eg08Ttjn69iU-WgLDSv-liPQd0pSI=) if you plan to attend, or consider [**DONATING**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gf0rNvNpMxKqFnPlc2R7IVfEF7IDjsY6659K3S1TnwY=/0y1PIXB-wSO6lfIkuoR64hfb8RjA2NMQK7gR9QsT3IU=?refcode=X_092219_Invite_SouthMountain_B) if you cannot make it, but want to show your support.

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gf0rNvNpMxKqFnPlc2R7IVfEF7IDjsY6659K3S1TnwY=/jjGH1A0Kap-dD7Eg08Ttjn69iU-WgLDSv-liPQd0pSI=)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gf0rNvNpMxKqFnPlc2R7IVfEF7IDjsY6659K3S1TnwY=/0y1PIXB-wSO6lfIkuoR64hfb8RjA2NMQK7gR9QsT3IU=?refcode=X_092219_Invite_SouthMountain_B)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gf0rNvNpMxKqFnPlc2R7IVfEF7IDjsY6659K3S1TnwY=/jjGH1A0Kap-dD7Eg08Ttjn69iU-WgLDSv-liPQd0pSI=)

This event will be critical to helping my campaign reach our end of quarter fundraising goal and I am expecting dozens of fellow supporters to be there as well.

[**If you 're interested in joining for this impactful event, please RSVP now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gf0rNvNpMxKqFnPlc2R7IVfEF7IDjsY6659K3S1TnwY=/CG_8oGIiM4KQQd2XO0e_2sS31P3-2hN03tXbA1IM6Ts=)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gf0rNvNpMxKqFnPlc2R7IVfEF7IDjsY6659K3S1TnwY=/jjGH1A0Kap-dD7Eg08Ttjn69iU-WgLDSv-liPQd0pSI=)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gf0rNvNpMxKqFnPlc2R7IVfEF7IDjsY6659K3S1TnwY=/0y1PIXB-wSO6lfIkuoR64hfb8RjA2NMQK7gR9QsT3IU=?refcode=X_092219_Invite_SouthMountain_B)

I hope to see you Saturday,

\-- _Greg Stanton_

We need to have an accurate count of who all to expect, so please = if you plan to attend, or consider if you cannot make it, but want to show your support. = = This event will be critical to helping my campaign reach our end of quarter fundraising goal and I am expecting dozens of fellow supporters to be there as well. = = I hope to see you Saturday, \-- Greg Stanton Paid for by Stanton for Congress Stanton for Congress 4340 E Indian School Rd. Suite 21-518 Phoenix AZ 85018 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
September 23, 2019
Contact: Press@johnkasich.com

**Gov. John Kasich Comments**

Gov. John Kasich recently discussed the troubling reports about the President's call with the leader of Ukraine:

_"We need to know what happened._
_
If in fact, the President of the United States pressured the leader of another country to investigate his political enemy - If in fact military aid was withheld, now we have to decide where to go from there._
_
If we don't deal with this, we become like a banana republic. And where are the Republicans?"_
