name: Jason Yates
subject: Historic Religious Freedom Speech made by President Trump
body:
| | Peter, This morning, [President Trump became the first sitting United States President to give a speech at the United Nations General Assembly solely focused on religious freedom](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=B-xMNSNcDpdY3m1jne-HGY9ILbv-e_ABNdekFC5DwgOxlxeKsUpkjgq3XbEpoQ3G5jVM32HcgRAccatdt88Y29GT2J9UjLB4k8AgRvXiJh9FelT6TXY9soYEgRB_Yu8b&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190923com01&n=1). He set the stage for world leaders by bringing faith to the forefront. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=B-xMNSNcDpdY3m1jne-HGY9ILbv-e_ABNdekFC5DwgOxlxeKsUpkjgq3XbEpoQ3G5jVM32HcgRAccatdt88Y29GT2J9UjLB4k8AgRvXiJh9FelT6TXY9soYEgRB_Yu8b&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190923com01&n=2) Before the event, the White House issued a statement saying, "The President is working to broaden international support for ongoing efforts to protect religious freedom in the wake of increasing persecution of people on the basis of their beliefs and a growing number of attacks on and destruction of houses of worship by state and non-state actors. The President will call on the international community to take concrete steps to prevent attacks against people on the basis of their religion or beliefs and to ensure the sanctity of houses of worship and all public spaces for all faiths." [The President began his remarks stating that the United States is "founded on the principle that our rights do not come from government; they come from God."](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=B-xMNSNcDpdY3m1jne-HGY9ILbv-e_ABNdekFC5DwgOxlxeKsUpkjgq3XbEpoQ3G5jVM32HcgRAccatdt88Y29GT2J9UjLB4k8AgRvXiJh9FelT6TXY9soYEgRB_Yu8b&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190923com01&n=3) According to President Trump, 80 percent of the world’s population lives in nations where religious freedom is threatened, restricted, or banned. In his historic address to the U.N. General Assembly, he cited several examples of recent persecution of Jews, Muslims, and Christians, adding that, on average, eleven Christians are killed each day for following the teachings of Christ. President Trump called religious persecution a “wound on all humanity” and offered his commitment to protect believers of every faith. "Today, I ask all nations to join us in this urgent moral duty," said the President during his speech. "We ask the governments of the world to honor the eternal right of every person to follow their conscience, live by their faith, and give glory to God. The United States has a vital role in this critical mission." Johnnie Moore, board member for My Faith Votes and a commissioner on the US Commission on International Religious Freedom, is attending the event and said this, “The President of the United States has decided to set his own agenda for the United Nations General Assembly and that agenda will involve the most sweeping, focused statement on religious freedom ever delivered by any President of the United States to the United Nations.” Moore went on to say, "Simply put, the President is using the full weight of the United States to force the issue of religious freedom on the agendas of world leaders at the United Nations. It is not a secondary issue to the United States. It is an organizing principle for the United States and ought to be for all global leaders. This is legitimately historic.” **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190923com01&n=4)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190923com01&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190923com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190923com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190923com01&n=8)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name to oppose President Trump's national emergency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[We're challenging President Trump's national emergency declaration in the Senate because this abuse of power must end. Add your name to join us.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c18/42ab3cf4/61ec115a/135d7b68/3853848134/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-trump-s-national-emergency?source=em190923&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
This week, Senate Democrats are forcing a vote to end the national emergency President Trump declared in an attempt to subvert the will of Congress and the American people and build his ineffective border wall.
We are stepping up the fight to stop President Trump in his tracks--do we have your support?
**[Add your name to join us as we fight to block the President's anti-immigrant agenda.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c18/42ab3cf4/61ec115a/135d7b68/3853848134/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-trump-s-national-emergency?source=em190923&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
President Trump is not only using his phony national emergency to get his way, he's now diverting funds from our military to fulfill this misguided campaign promise.
Every Republican Senator must go on record about whether they will continue to allow President Trump's abuse of power at the southern border.
**[Stand with us and oppose President Trump's national emergency. Sign on now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c18/42ab3cf4/61ec115a/135d7b68/3853848134/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-trump-s-national-emergency?source=em190923&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Sign the Petition](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c18/42ab3cf4/61ec115a/135d7b68/3853848134/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-trump-s-national-emergency?source=em190923&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

subject: Trump just admitted to another impeachable offense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Hello Peter, Trump on Sunday said that, in his call with the Ukarnian president, he did in fact discuss Joe Biden and his son \-- this is the same topic that allegedly triggered a whistleblower to file a formal complaint about the incident. This unprecedented use of political power to gain leverage against political opponents only highlights the latest in the deep political corruption facing Trump and his administration. Trump and his entire team are now working around the clock to stop this whistleblower from disclosing more details to Congress and the public. Nancy Pelosi issued a vague warning in response to this admission and subsequent blocking, saying it "will take us into a whole new stage of investigation." But this isn't enough for many Democrats, who are frustrated by her slow progress on impeachment proceedings. The House has the power to begin impeachment proceedings, but Democratic leadership is dragging its heels, so please let us know: **Should we impeach Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd32/6e9863e8/14e7ae6a/1db0d504/3347341598/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/KZhNDgwI") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd32/6e9863e8/14e7ae6a/1db0d504/3347341598/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/KZhNDgwI") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd32/6e9863e8/14e7ae6a/1db0d509/3347341598/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190923c.ND-b&refcode2=RuRXLXrJJINxyI8jWydl")

name: Mary Ellen Smith, Team Hick
subject: Under a magnifying glass
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
After our quarterly deadline coming up just one week from today, we're required to file our first report with the FEC showing our fundraising progress. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d8/691c9bd/6e1fc414/11a7ae4f/3213939817/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, starting in October, we'll be under a magnifying glass.

That's because after our quarterly deadline coming up just **one week** from today, we're required to file our first report with the FEC showing our fundraising progress.

Since we launched, we've gotten a lot of positive news about how this race is going, including polling showing John in the best position to beat Cory Gardner. **But all that could change if our report doesn't reflect the robust grassroots support we have all across this state.**

Fundraising reports like this tell a story about the strength of a campaign and how it's built. Cory Gardner's last report showed he has nearly $5 million in the bank--and it tells us he'll have plenty of support from groups like corporate PACs.

We know that at Gardner HQ, they're crossing their fingers and hoping that our report shows that we're not as strong as we seem. But with your help, our first FEC report will show we're building this the right way, growing this campaign one donation at a time without taking a penny from corporate PACs.

**Let 's show them what they're up against. **[**_Chip in now to send a clear message to everyone watching this race: We 're ready to win this thing._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190923_MES_20190923-fr-MES-fecreport-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Mary Ellen

Mary Ellen Smith
Campaign Manager
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190923_MES_20190923-fr-MES-fecreport-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d8/691c9bd/6e1fc414/11a7ae4a/3213939817/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d8/691c9bd/6e1fc414/11a7ae4b/3213939817/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d8/691c9bd/6e1fc414/11a7ae48/3213939817/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d8/691c9bd/6e1fc414/11a7ae49/3213939817/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d8/691c9bd/6e1fc414/11a7ae46/3213939817/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d8/691c9bd/6e1fc414/11a7ae47/3213939817/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d8/691c9bd/6e1fc414/11a7ae4a/3213939817/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: See the best moments: ‘How great is America?’ says Australian leader
body:
Under the stars, President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump hosted a celebratory State Dinner at the White House Friday night for... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87d5668af8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 23, 2019
---
| | |
# **See the best moments: ‘How great is America?’ says Australian leader**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0253320f60&e=3ee4985eea "The State Visit of the Prime Minister of Australia and Mrs. Morrison")
---
| **Under the stars** , President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump hosted a celebratory State Dinner at the White House Friday night for two special guests of honor: Australian Prime Minister Scott Morrison and First Lady Jenny Morrison.

**“Melania and I** are immensely honored to host you and the entire Australian delegation for a State Dinner in the historic Rose Garden,” President Trump said. “Tonight, we celebrate more than a century of loyal and devoted friendship between the United States and Australia.”

**Australia’s State Visit** —the second official ceremonial State Visit of the Trump Presidency—was both a celebration of the unbreakable bond these two countries share and a reaffirmation of our common vision for peace and prosperity around the world.

**The busy weekend** began with a full military arrival ceremony on the South Lawn Friday morning. Under clear skies, hundreds of guests gathered to watch Marine Band performances of both countries’ beautiful national anthems. During the ceremony, Prime Minister Scott Morrison said that no two nations make better friends than America and Australia—and explained how American ideals have inspired countries the world over.

**“How great is America?** The world is a better place because of this country living out its moral purpose—a world not just more secure, but more prosperous as well,” he said. “The new economies of the world lifting hundreds of millions from poverty do so because they first saw the United States define a century and do that first, and then invited and supported them to follow.”

**Prime Minister Morrison** also joined President Trump at Pratt Industries in Ohio yesterday for an event that underscores the powerful economic ties between our countries. President Trump announced that American manufacturing is in store for yet another boost thanks to billions being invested by Australian factory owner Anthony Pratt. All told, that faith in U.S. workers will create 5,000 new jobs on its own over the next decade.

**“Here in Ohio** , we see the shining example of the wonderful future we can build together—a future where proud, independent nations uplift each other and the world by uplifting their own citizens.”

[President Trump wins big Ohio manufacturing investment from Australian firm](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7a8f017e43&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **Watch:**[White House arrival ceremony for the Prime Minister of Australia](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9fd3b3693e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **At UN, President Trump calls for global action to end religious persecution**

**President Trump** kicked off this week at the 74th session of the United Nations General Assembly (UNGA) in New York with a simple but powerful statement.

**“Today,** with one clear voice, the United States of America calls upon all the nations of the world to end religious persecution. To stop the crimes against people of faith, release prisoners of conscience, repeal laws restricting freedom of religion and belief, protect the vulnerable, the defenseless, and the oppressed.”

** ****President Trump:** [Our founders understood the right to religious freedom](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f91ffe8ed5&e=3ee4985eea)

**“America stands with believers** in every country who ask only for the freedom to live according to the faith that is within their own hearts.”

**Religious freedom** is in a state of global crisis. Right now, a stunning 83 percent of the world’s population lives in nations where religious freedom is threatened or banned. The resulting violence has been on the rise for the past decade, affecting many faiths.

**That’s why** **President Trump** is putting the issue center stage this week at the United Nations, an organization with the power to do more to hold bad actors accountable. The right to follow religious convictions is built into the very fabric of America, but that right shouldn’t be exclusive to us. Citizens of _every_ nation should be allowed to worship freely.

[Learn more about how President Trump is standing up for religious freedom in America and around the world.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b5d51cbec&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
| **First Lady Melania Trump talks with guests at the State Dinner in honor of Australian Prime Minister Scott Morrison and his wife Mrs. Jenny Morrison** | September 20, 2019
---
|

name: Michael Bennet
subject: honest request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

I'll be honest: [I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf78/134673f2/ab05f8b/6996079a/1931269899/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B2_092319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

This week is crucial to our campaign. We're facing our end-of-quarter deadline and another DNC debate stage qualifier deadline - and we need to raise another $150,000 before then.

Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our campaign has made enormous progress.

Some people considered our campaign a long shot, [but the strength of this grassroots movement continues to prove them all wrong.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf78/134673f2/ab05f8b/6996079a/1931269899/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B2_092319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

After next Monday, our fundraising numbers will be made public and the doubters are chomping at the bit to suggest that this campaign isn't ready for the long haul.

I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, so every step I take in this journey is because you're there with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[It's your commitment to fueling our campaign that keeps us going. ](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf78/134673f2/ab05f8b/6996079a/1931269899/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B2_092319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Today, I'm counting on your support. We can't afford to fall short now that we've come so far. Will you rush a donation right now to shut down the doubters again ahead of these crucial deadlines? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf78/134673f2/ab05f8b/6996079a/1931269899/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B2_092319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [RUSH A DONATION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf78/134673f2/ab05f8b/6996079a/1931269899/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B2_092319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Since I haven't spent a lifetime in politics, many people didn't know me when I announced my candidacy -- but now they're paying attention!

As a senator from a purple state, I've never known an easy election, and I'm ready to continue this fight no matter how many people doubt us.

[I need to know you're standing with me at this crucial moment. ](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf78/134673f2/ab05f8b/6996079a/1931269899/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-eoq?refcode=EM_FR_B2_092319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Team, your support is crucial ahead of these deadlines. name: Angie Craig
subject: We can beat Jason Lewis again, but only with your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Two years ago, I stood up for my community and unseated Jason Lewis in Congress, because we had enough of his right-wing extremism. It took grassroots support to keep Lewis' hateful views out of Washi

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190923craig-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

I know firsthand what it's like running against Jason Lewis.

Four years ago, we battled to represent Minnesota's 2nd Congressional District -- and I lost. But I dusted myself off and took him on AGAIN. And the second time around, I won.

It took a lot of hard work and commitment to get the job done. We had to dig deep by organizing our neighborhoods and building a grassroots movement to outpace the Republican money machine.

And now that he has decided to run against Tina, we are running the risk of having his hateful rhetoric return to Washington.

**I know better than anyone what it takes to defeat Jason Lewis -- and it's why I'm making sure Tina has the strongest campaign possible. She needs your support in order to take on anything Jason Lewis and the Republicans throw at her.**

**[Tina needs us to have her back now. Please rush $10 or as much as you can now so we can defend Minnesota's Senate seat. Jason Lewis will have big checks from special interests, wealthy donors, and dark money organizations -- Tina has YOU. ](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190923craig-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41319/c1f7015/67ad46b8/11459419/3846795748/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoiYWNfdGluYS1zbWl0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTA5MjNjcmFpZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190923craig-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41319/c1f7015/67ad46b8/1145941a/3846795748/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoiYWNfdGluYS1zbWl0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTA5MjNjcmFpZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190923craig-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41319/c1f7015/67ad46b8/1145941b/3846795748/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoiYWNfdGluYS1zbWl0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTA5MjNjcmFpZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190923craig-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41319/c1f7015/67ad46b8/1145941c/3846795748/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoiYWNfdGluYS1zbWl0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTA5MjNjcmFpZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190923craig-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41319/c1f7015/67ad46b8/1145941d/3846795748/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoiYWNfdGluYS1zbWl0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTA5MjNjcmFpZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190923craig-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41319/c1f7015/67ad46b8/1145941e/3846795748/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoiYWNfdGluYS1zbWl0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTA5MjNjcmFpZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190923craig-full-exp&amount=25")
---
**We cannot underestimate Jason Lewis in this race and what that will mean for the Senate.**

He is mean spirited and has a long history of offensive views about women, people of color, and members of the LGBTQ+ community. Someone who expresses those views, who won't stand up for my family and families like mine, doesn't belong in the House, and there's no way I'll let him speak for Minnesotans in the Senate.

You can bet that he will vote in lockstep with Trump and Mitch McConnell if elected to the Senate, like gutting health care and handing out tax breaks to Wall Street. Just like he did in the House.

Jason Lewis is hedging his bets that Trump will win Minnesota, and even CNN is saying that it's possible. **Tina will be our main line of defense from the Republicans, but she needs our help to take Jason Lewis on.**

**[So if you care about taking on Trump, retaking the Senate for Democrats, and fighting for our shared values -- you need to rush $10 or as much as you can now to Tina. She needs our help in this moment.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190923craig-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you for everything you do,

Angie
****U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.**** **[CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190923craig-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")**
---

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: This new poll is big news for us!
body:
The math works.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c40/4bef7a87/68992bc7/287f33f3/3159915237/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends, this is big!
A research group just did a poll in Maine - and it's great news for us. Here's why:
_" When asked if Sen. Susan Collins has performed 'well enough to deserve re-election' or if it was 'time to give a new person a chance to do better,' 38 percent said re-election and **55 percent said new person**."
\- POLITICO Morning Score_
The math works for us. If 55% of Mainers are ready for new leadership in the Senate, Susan Collins is _OUT!_
Now we need to make sure that every single Mainer - in every corner of the state - hears Sara's message.
**That means we need to go up with ads. We need to hire field staff. But all that takes resources, so we have to ask:**
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before our FEC fundraising deadline on September 30th? With this new poll and our upcoming deadline, this is a big moment for our campaign.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c40/4bef7a87/68992bc7/287f33f2/3159915237/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjMtMy1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190923-3-a")
This poll proves once and for all that Sara Gideon can win. It won't be easy. But if we are willing to put in the hard work, we can flip this Senate seat.
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c40/4bef7a87/68992bc7/287f33f1/3159915237/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjMtMy1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190923-3-a")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c40/4bef7a87/68992bc7/287f33f0/3159915237/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c40/4bef7a87/68992bc7/287f33f7/3159915237/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

body:
|
---
**Watch Bill Debate:
** Tuesday, September 24, 2019 at 7:00 PM
Business Insider Today Facebook Page Bill is joining former Congressman Joe Walsh on the debate stage tomorrow night from 7:00 - 8:30 PM. You’ll be able to watch the debate on the **[Business Insider Today Facebook page](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6n-P74sVpsf1GVJ7VOm1tUlvXwsAo80I-KXcLDJAc9W5&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190923_2&n=1)**. While we’re excited Bill will get a chance to tell the American people why he should be the next President of the United States, **we remain disappointed in President Trump’s unwillingness to take the debate stage with Bill or any of his opponents.** We’re not sure what the president is afraid of, but regardless of whether or not he’s on the stage, Bill plans to show voters why he is the person they need to reclaim the Republican party and our country. [**But before Bill hits the stage tomorrow night, he needs to know you’ve got his back. Can you make a donation of $50, $100, or whatever you can today to show your support for Bill headed into tomorrow's debate?** ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCFhSUoYr0XArOZcDvtYrYNI&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190923_2&n=2) Thanks for standing with us,

subject: This is why the September FEC deadline matters (a lot)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
They will judge how strong we are. So let's show our strength. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529987/45c30650/13470ea6c/668ab7ed/2953521008/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
**[In this email, we're going to ask if you can make a contribution before the September FEC fundraising deadline.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529987/45c30650/13470ea6c/668ab7ec/2953521008/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KNzdGX0VPUV9HT0xfUV8yMDE5MDkyM19WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ77F_EOQ_GOL_Q_20190923_V1S1_P")**

But first, we want to take a second to talk about why this deadline matters (a lot).

After the deadline, all of the presidential candidates will put together reports on how much they've raised in the third quarter of 2019 -- from July 1 through September 30.

Every campaign will submit those reports to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) and then release those reports to the public.

**You know who'll pay special attention to Elizabeth's fundraising report?**

**Political reporters and pundits** -- to see whether there's wide support for our bold plans to level the playing field for working people.

**And powerful special interests** -- to see whether we're actually building a grassroots movement that'll be strong enough to put power in the hands of the people.

**They will judge how strong we are. So let's show our strength.

[Thank you for everything you already do to make this campaign possible. If you're able, please make your first donation right now to help make our report as strong as possible before the September FEC deadline.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529987/45c30650/13470ea6c/668ab7ec/2953521008/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KNzdGX0VPUV9HT0xfUV8yMDE5MDkyM19WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ77F_EOQ_GOL_Q_20190923_V1S1_P")**
